title: Scottish Chickpea Pasty
description: A twist on the traditional Cornish pasty, infused with the flavors of Scotland and the comfort of chickpeas.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine shortbread crust mix, flour, salt, and sugar. Mix well.
3. Gradually add water to the bowl, stirring until the dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired pasty size.
5. Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
6. Place a tablespoon of sausage and a quarter cup of chickpeas in the center of each circle.
7. Fold the dough over the filling, pressing edges together to seal.
8. Use a fork to crimp the edges and create a decorative border.
9. Place the pasties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Brush the tops with a beaten egg for a golden glaze.
11. Bake the pasties for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
